questionHtml: Using your sketched graph in (b), identify the feature that shows that net work is done by the gas in this three-step cycle.
markschemeHtml:
area enclosed

work is done by the gas during expansion

OR

work is done on the gas during compression

the area under the expansion is greater than the area under the compression

meta.title: Using your sketched graph in (b), identify the feature that shows that net work is done by the gas in this three-step cycle.
